title: Grok AI: What It's Actually For
modules: What Grok Is, Who Made It, and How It's Different
Getting Started: Interface, Access, and First Prompts
Where Grok Shines: Real-Time Info and Edgy Questions
Using Grok for Research, Writing, and Daily Tasks
Grok's Weaknesses and When to Use Something Else
synopsis: Grok is xAI's answer to ChatGPT, and it's worth knowing what it actually does differently — especially its real-time web access and less filtered responses. This course cuts through the hype and shows you exactly when and how to use it as a practical everyday tool.
rationale: Grok has significant search interest among young adults but almost no structured educational content exists to help them evaluate it honestly against other tools they already use.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can use Grok effectively for real-time research and everyday AI tasks, and make informed decisions about when it outperforms or underperforms other AI tools.
